name: Turkey, Onion, and Tomato Pita Pockets
recipeIngredient: 1 medium Red onion, peeled & thinly sliced into rings
1 cup Turkey, cooked and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, toss together the onion, tomatoes, turkey, lettuce, and basil.
2. Sprinkle with the brown sugar and drizzle with the vinegar and olive oil.
3. Toss well and season with salt and pepper.
4. Cover and let marinate in the refrigerator for at least two hours.
5. To make the sandwich, mound the mixture into the pita pockets.
6. Serve at once.
